description: CompositionKnitted white sweater vest made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed V-neckline with dark navy blue stripes, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, cable knit panels on the front and back, embroidered brand logo on the upper right chest and a ribbed hemlineFittingRegularWash careHand wash cold inside out with like coloursLay flat to dryReshape and warm ironDry cleanThis white sweater vest from nike is inspired by classic cricket clothing design. The cable knit panels and long sleeves add comfortable warmth to the sweater, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with shirts and jeans or chinos.
